feed.title: georgiabankruptcy.org -- Bankruptcy Information
feed.subtitle: Free bankruptcy information and guides from the Open Bankruptcy Project

entry.title: Georgia Bankruptcy -- Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide [2026]
entry.summary: Free Georgia bankruptcy guide for 2026. Compare Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13, Georgia exemptions, filing costs, means test, and what to expect in your case.

entry.title: Bank Accounts and Bankruptcy in Georgia
entry.summary: How bankruptcy affects your bank account in Georgia. Levies, setoff rights, protecting deposits, and what to do before filing in N.D. Ga., M.D. Ga., and S.

entry.title: Can I Buy a Car While in Chapter 13 in Georgia?
entry.summary: How to buy a car during Chapter 13 bankruptcy in Georgia. Court motions, trustee approval, interest rates, and budget requirements.

entry.title: Buying a House After Bankruptcy in Georgia
entry.summary: When and how you can buy a home after filing bankruptcy in Georgia. Waiting periods for FHA, VA, and conventional loans, credit rebuilding, and Georgia.

entry.title: Car Leases and Bankruptcy in Georgia
entry.summary: What happens to your car lease in Georgia bankruptcy. Assume or reject, 60-day deadline, early termination fees, and practical options.

entry.title: Chapter 13 Bankruptcy Eligibility in Georgia
entry.summary: Chapter 13 eligibility requirements in Georgia. Debt limits, regular income, plan length, and requirements for filing in N.D. Ga., M.D. Ga., and S.D. Ga..

entry.title: Chapter 13 Payments in Georgia
entry.summary: How Chapter 13 payment amounts are calculated in Georgia. Disposable income, plan length, missed payments, and modification options in N.D. Ga., M.D. Ga.

entry.title: Chapter 13 Bankruptcy in Georgia -- Payment Plans, Timeline
entry.summary: Guide to Chapter 13 bankruptcy in Georgia. Payment plan basics, timeline, 3-5 year commitment, and what to expect during the repayment process.

entry.title: Chapter 7 Bankruptcy Eligibility in Georgia
entry.summary: Do you qualify for Chapter 7 bankruptcy in Georgia? Means test, income limits, prior filing bars, and eligibility requirements for N.D. Ga., M.D. Ga.

entry.title: Chapter 7 Bankruptcy in Georgia -- Eligibility, Exemptions, Timeline
entry.summary: Complete guide to Chapter 7 bankruptcy in Georgia. Covers Georgia exemptions (homestead: $21,500), means test, timeline, and what to expect.
